name: Multi-Intent AI Assistant - Partial (Through Intent Processing)

parameters.initialMessages: Hi, please share your user ID and 4-digit PIN to continue.

options.title: AI Workflow Agent
options.subtitle: Authentication, intent capture, and intent processing

options.systemMessage: You are the currency conversion specialist for a multi-intent assistant. Always use the provided currency tool before answering. Answer only the current currency intent. Do not answer date, time, or any other pending intent. Keep the answer concise.

parameters.name: fetch_currency_rate
parameters.description: Fetch a currency rate from Frankfurter. The tool input must be a JSON string with base, quote, amount, and optional date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use this tool for every currency intent before you answer.

options.systemMessage: You are the natural language date and time specialist for a multi-intent assistant. Always use the provided date-time tool before answering. Answer only the current date/time intent. Do not answer currency or any other pending intent. Keep the answer concise.

parameters.name: generate_date_time
parameters.description: Generate the requested date or time from a natural language request. The tool input will be the user's raw request string. Use it for requests like tomorrow, next Monday, coming Sunday, or 2 hours from now.

parameters.content:
Scope implemented here: Welcome, Authentication, Intent Capture & Confirmation, Intent Handler, Currency Converter Agent, DateTime Agent, Answer Intent state, and Call Wrap-up.

Compatibility note: chat response uses When Last Node Finishes. Intent Handler routes one queued intent per chat turn to exactly one specialist OpenAI agent, then Finalize Intent Batch returns the answer. When no intents remain, Call Wrap-up asks whether the user needs anything else; yes routes back to intent capture/confirmation and no ends cleanly.
